verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A little boy of thirteen was on his way to school He heard a crowd of people laughing And he went to take a look Thousands were listening to the stories of one man He spoke with such wisdom, Even the kids could understand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The hours passed so quickly, The day turned into night Everyone was hungry But there was no food in sight The boy looked in his lunchbox At the little that he had He wasn't sure what good it'd do, There were thousands to be fed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But he saw the twinkling eyes of Jesus The kindness in His smile And the boy cried out With the trust of a child He said:

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: "Take my five loaves and two fishes Do with it as you will I surrender Take my fears and my inhibitions All my burdens, my ambitions You can use it all to feed them all"

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I often think about that boy When I'm feeling small And I worry that the work I do Means nothing at all

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: But every single tear I cry Is a diamond in His hands And every door that slams in my face, I will offer up in prayer

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So I'll give you every breath that I have Oh Lord, you can work miracles All that you need is my "Amen"

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: So take my five loaves and two fishes Do with it as you will I surrender Take my fears and my inhibitions All my burdens, my ambitions You can use it all I hope it's not too small

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I trust in you I trust in you

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: So take my five loaves and two fishes Do with it as you will I surrender Take my fears and my inhibitions All my burdens, my ambitions You can use it all No gift is too small
